citations.claim: Package structure defines static library and CLI executable products targeting macOS 13+
SecureEnclaveIdentity class manages hardware-bound P-256 keys with creation and loading constructors
Signing operation returns DER-encoded ECDSA signature using Secure Enclave hardware
AttestationBlob struct contains comprehensive hardware and security state fields in alphabetical order
JSON encoding uses .sortedKeys for deterministic output and signs the encoded blob
FFI bridge creates Secure Enclave identities and returns opaque pointers using Unmanaged.passRetained
FFI signing function takes raw bytes and returns base64-encoded DER signature
CLI tool provides attest and info commands with optional encryption key and binary hash parameters
System info helpers use system_profiler and sysctl to collect hardware identification
Security checks include SIP status via csrutil command execution
Tests verify JSON serialization produces sorted keys in alphabetical order for deterministic signing
FFI bridge tests validate C interface for identity creation, key export, and memory management
